h1: Custom Adhesive Notepads for Everyday Office Use
metaDescription: Order custom adhesive notepads from Perfect Imprints. Ideal for offices and promotions. Low MOQs and fast turnaround. Shop now.
introHtml:
Marketing directors, HR directors, safety managers, and business owners often need a simple, effective way to keep their brand top of mind. Custom adhesive notepads meet that need. They are used daily in offices, break rooms, and homes, ensuring your logo or message is seen multiple times a day. Perfect Imprints offers a wide range of sizes and sheet counts to fit any budget and use case.

Choose from standard adhesive notepads or die-cut shapes to stand out. Sizes range from small 2" x 3" pads for quick reminders to larger 12" x 2" pads for lists and schedules. Sheet counts include 25, 50, and 100 sheets per pad. All notepads are printed with your custom design in full color, and the adhesive backing keeps them securely in place on desks, walls, or monitors.

Ordering is straightforward. No minimum quantity requirements for stock sizes, and production typically takes 5-7 business days. Request a free quote or order online today.

faqs.q: What sizes do your custom adhesive notepads come in?
faqs.a: We offer a variety of sizes including 2" x 3", 3" x 3", 4" x 3", 4" x 6", 6" x 4", and 12" x 2". Die-cut shapes are also available in 3" x 3" and 4" x 3" sizes. All sizes can be customized with your artwork.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for adhesive notepads?
faqs.a: There are no minimum quantity requirements for stock sizes. You can order as few as 25 pads for smaller sheet counts. Die-cut notepads may have higher minimums. Contact us for specific details.
We use full-color offset printing for sharp, vibrant results. Your logo or design is printed on the top sheet of each pad. We also offer one-color or spot-color options if needed.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a large order?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer samples of our stock notepads. You can request a sample by contacting our sales team. Custom samples with your artwork may be available for a fee.

faqs.q: What is the typical production lead time?
faqs.a: Standard production takes 5-7 business days after artwork approval. Rush orders may be available for an additional charge. Shipping time depends on your location and chosen method.

heroAltText: Assorted custom adhesive notepads with company logos in various sizes including 3x3 and 4x6 pads
